tasks.title: Draft OpenSpec change for canonical edge model and refs/check behavior
tasks.summary: Create the OpenSpec proposal, design notes, task checklist, and bilink-cli spec deltas for the canonical edge model plus refs/check upgrade.
notes: Must include explicit non-goals for rename engine, watch state machine, block refs, and anchor auto-rewrite.

tasks.title: Validate and review the OpenSpec proposal
tasks.summary: Run strict OpenSpec validation and review the proposed behavior against PRD, architecture, and the existing researcher topic before implementation starts.
notes: Expected gate includes openspec validation plus feature-tracker validation.

tasks.title: Implement canonical edge model after approval
tasks.summary: Implement the shared edge schema and resolver only after the OpenSpec change is approved.
notes: Use TDD fixtures for relative Markdown targets, duplicate basenames, unresolved links, anchors, and source-aware refs.

tasks.title: Upgrade refs and check on top of canonical edges
tasks.summary: Make refs/check consume canonical edges and emit source-aware JSON/text diagnostics for resolved, unresolved, and ambiguous explicit links.
notes: Do not expand into rename/watch behavior in this feature.
